case_title: ESTRADA MARIA E. VS LEAMAN TONY ALLEN

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM MAR-16-1992 TO MAR-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
